content:
Hey Dev Community! 🚀

Our team at IP-Meta is growing, and we are looking for an autonomous, product-minded Full-Stack Developer to help us build high-throughput, real-time developer tools.

If you love building developer-facing infrastructure, working with fast API networks, and taking complete ownership of your code, we’d love to have you.

💼 The Overview

Location: 100% Remote (Work from anywhere)

Compensation: $1,200 – $1,900 / month

Type: Full-time (Following a fast, clear 1-month probation period)

🛠️ Our Tech Stack

You’ll be diving straight into a modern backend and clean, responsive user interfaces:

Backend & Database: Node.js, Firebase, Cloud Firestore

Architecture: High-performance REST APIs

Frontend: HTML, modern JavaScript, Tailwind CSS

🎯 What We're Looking For

Strong proficiency in Node.js and asynchronous programming.

Production experience dealing with Firebase infrastructure (Firestore, Cloud Functions, and Auth).

Experience designing and scaling robust REST APIs.

A self-starter attitude—since we are fully remote, we value clear async communication and end-to-end execution.

🎁 Perks & Benefits

We want to make sure you have everything you need to do your best work from day one:

💻 Work Hardware Provided: We ship a brand-new laptop directly to your doorstep on your first day.

🌐 Internet Stipend: We fully cover your monthly connectivity costs.

🏥 Medical Insurance: Comprehensive health cover starting on day one.

🏡 100% Remote-First: Work from home, a local coffee shop, or wherever you feel most productive.

📝 How to Apply

Ready to ship with us? Jump over to our careers page to drop your details:

👉 Apply Here: Apply Now!

💡 Pro-Tip for Dev.to:

When you create the post, add these specific tags in the tag selection field to ensure it hits the right feeds:

discuss, #career, #job, #javascript
